recap: Split `ask user` into two entries in GLOSSARY.md; updated Relationships, 4-cases table, and Flagged ambiguities.
Renamed mock-solkan-ask → mock-solkan-reject-multi, added mock-solkan-reject-single, updated _run_hook to pass CLAUDE_HOOKS_LOG_DIR/CLAUDE_SESSIONS_DIR, made hook log dir overridable via env var.

Sibling scripts (.zsh) define preToolUse-Bash-solkan() and preToolUse-Bash-rtk() with guard (whence); hook sources unconditionally; tests mock by full function name via bats_mock — no naming collision with binaries, no recursion risk.
Hook reject path was already correct from 02b refactor; added missing test for AC5 (no systemMessage in reject output).

Added session state: single-reject uses permissionDecision=ask with reason on first encounter, defer with no reason on repeat; multi-reject always uses ask; state written to $CLAUDE_SESSIONS_DIR/{sessionId}/state.json.
